body: This PR should fix the percent change computation when we have strings (when functions don't exist).
title: Fix table perf percent change w strings

body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
This applies the same `bycolumn` transformation to the remainder tendency, and also adds a few extra components to the profile. As a side-effect, it means that we now apply horizontal and vertical operations separately (which we will need for limiters in any case).

## Benefits and Risks
Appears to give a small speedup and slightly better threaded performance. It involves rearranging terms, so may give slight numerical differences.

## Linked Issues
(Provide references to any link issues. Use closes #issuenum to automatically close an open issue)
- Fixes #
- Closes #

title: Use bycolumn on remainder

body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
Refactors the surface flux calculation to use surface_conditions

## Benefits and Risks
This makes the surface flux calculation cleaner, and is a step towards using Monin Obukhov
